tasks.subject: Task 1: resolve_prompt helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure `resolve_prompt(job) -> str | None` helper.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/prompt_routing.py`
- Test:   `tests/core/test_prompt_routing.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_prompt_routing.py -v` â†’ 8 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/prompt_routing.py", "tests/core/test_prompt_routing.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_prompt_routing.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spec prompt returned when non-empty str", "segment prompt returned when spec lacks key", "spec wins over segment", "None when neither present", "None when spec '' and no segments", "None when spec is non-str", "None when segments empty", "segment returned when spec is ''", "no imports outside stdlib + core.interfaces", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: prompt_body_key config field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `prompt_body_key: str | None = "prompt"` to `HostedEngineConfig` + `DiffusersEngineConfig`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/ -v -k prompt_body_key` â†’ 4 new passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/ -v -k prompt_body_key", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hosted prompt_body_key='prompt' round-trips", "hosted prompt_body_key=None round-trips", "default is 'prompt'", "same 3 on diffusers", "YAML null does not raise", "no comfyui cfg change", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: HostedAPIBackend + Engine prompt wire
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HostedAPIBackend.submit routes prompt; Engine.validate_spec opt-in raise; backend() cfg read.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["submit falls back to segment prompt", "submit preserves spec prompt", "submit skips when prompt_body_key None", "validate_spec raises when configured + no prompt", "validate_spec passes when disabled + no prompt", "YAML E2E routes through engine.backend", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DiffusersBackend + Engine prompt wire
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror Task 3 for Diffusers.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["submit falls back to segment prompt", "submit preserves spec prompt", "submit skips when prompt_body_key None", "validate_spec raises when configured + no prompt", "validate_spec passes when disabled + no prompt", "YAML E2E routes through engine.backend", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ComfyUIBackend + Engine prompt wire (spec-level)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ComfyUI submit reads spec.prompt_node_ids and routes into node_overrides[node_id].inputs.text; validate_spec opt-in raise.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["submit routes into node_overrides inputs.text", "submit skips when prompt_node_ids absent", "submit does not overwrite explicit text (setdefault)", "spec prompt wins over segment", "validate_spec raises when configured + no prompt", "validate_spec passes when disabled + no prompt", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: FalBackend.submit retrofit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inline FalBackend prompt fallback with resolve_prompt; behavior identical.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_fal.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/fal/__init__.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_fal.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["inline fallback replaced by resolve_prompt", "test_submit_falls_back_to_segment_prompt passes", "test_submit_spec_prompt_wins_over_segment_prompt passes", "test_validate_spec_accepts_prompt_on_segment passes", "FalEngine.validate_spec body unchanged", "pre-commit clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Examples + README + PROGRESS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document prompt routing in example YAMLs + README + PROGRESS Phase 20 entry.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` â†’ green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/hosted.yaml", "examples/configs/diffusers.yaml", "examples/configs/wan.yaml", "README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hosted.yaml documents prompt_body_key", "diffusers.yaml documents prompt_body_key", "wan.yaml documents prompt_node_ids", "README mentions cross-engine prompt routing", "PROGRESS Phase 20 entry added", "full suite green", "pre-commit all-files green", "test_examples.py passes"]}
```
